fix(hot-reload): P0 assembly over-loading, thread safety, module scoring; P1 EndsWith, TOCTOU

P0 fixes (expert panel identified):
- resolveAssembly: use AssemblyName.GetAssemblyName() to inspect version
  metadata BEFORE loading. Previously Assembly.LoadFrom on ALL candidates
  polluted the AppDomain. Now only the best candidate is loaded.
- assemblySearchPaths: ResizeArray → ConcurrentDictionary for thread safety.
  Assembly resolve callbacks fire on arbitrary CLR threads.
- Module scoring: Seq.tryHead → Seq.fold max 0. tryHead took the score
  from the first open module; fold finds the best match across all modules.

P1 fixes:
- Pre-filter .Contains → .EndsWith(Ordinal) for consistency with scoring.
  .Contains matched 'getUser' inside 'getUsers'; .EndsWith does not.
- perFileCts: manual TryGetValue+Cancel+Dispose → ConcurrentDictionary.AddOrUpdate
  to eliminate TOCTOU race on rapid saves.

8 new tests (65 total): thread safety, module scoring max, EndsWith pre-filter.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Improve file transfer error handling (Step 5.2)

Implements comprehensive error handling for file transfers:

1. Disk-full error detection:
   - Added isOutOfDiskSpaceError() to detect disk space issues
   - Enhanced writeFileChunk() with specific error logging

2. File-not-found error handling:
   - Updated handleFileChunkRequest() to detect missing files
   - Proper cleanup when source file is deleted during transfer

3. Stalled transfer detection:
   - Added monitorStalledTransfers() goroutine (30s check interval)
   - Transfers idle for >5 minutes are automatically cancelled
   - LastActivity timestamp tracked on all chunk operations

4. Partial file cleanup:
   - abortFileReceive() now removes incomplete files
   - abortFileSend() added for outgoing transfer cleanup
   - Both functions notify via FIFO with abort messages

5. Enhanced transfer tracking:
   - Added FilePath field to both transfer structs
   - Added LastActivity field for timeout detection
   - All chunk operations update activity timestamp

All tests pass with race detection. Minor complexity increases
are within acceptable limits (all functions <= cyclomatic 10).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(hot-reload): race condition, exact matching, cancel-and-restart, scroll preservation

Tier 1 fixes (bugs/correctness):
- compilationState race condition: SemaphoreSlim(1,1) serializes file
  change processing so two rapid saves can't corrupt mutable state
- FuzzySharp replaced with exact EndsWith suffix matching: prevents
  wrong method detours (e.g. getUser vs getUsers had high Fuzz.Ratio)
- #load fallback removed: parse failures now broadcastCompilationFailed
  instead of dangerously re-executing module-level side effects
- NonBlockingRun guard: skip string rewriting when hotReload=true to
  avoid conflict with DevReloadInjector's Harmony patches

Tier 2 fixes (DX improvements):
- Cancel-and-restart on rapid saves: per-file CancellationTokenSource
  dictionary cancels in-flight eval when newer save arrives, preventing
  intermediate error flashes
- Scroll position preservation: saves window.scrollY to sessionStorage
  before DevReload SSE triggers page reload, restores on load
- Prefer highest assembly version: resolveAssembly collects all
  candidates and sortByDescending version instead of first-match

Tests: 57 hot reload tests (11 new: exact matching, NonBlockingRun
guard, version resolution). All DevReload tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Decompose GameSession god object with IMessageHandler interface and 5 domain handlers

Extract domain-specific message handling from GameSession into dedicated
handler classes that implement the new IMessageHandler interface:

- CombatHandler: TARGET_LOCK, TARGET_UNLOCK, MODULE_ACTIVATE, MODULE_DEACTIVATE
- StationHandler: DOCK_REQUEST, UNDOCK_REQUEST, REPAIR_REQUEST
- MovementHandler: WARP_REQUEST, APPROACH, ORBIT, STOP
- ScannerHandler: SCAN_START, SCAN_STOP, ANOMALY_LIST
- MissionHandler: MISSION_LIST, ACCEPT_MISSION, ABANDON_MISSION, MISSION_PROGRESS

GameSession now delegates to handlers via a canHandle()/handle() loop,
keeping only core session management (CONNECT, DISCONNECT, INPUT_MOVE, CHAT).
System injection methods are preserved on GameSession and forwarded to the
appropriate handler, maintaining backward compatibility.

This addresses SPAGHETTI_CODE_AUDIT.md Issue 3, Step 3.
